shortDescription: "One can cast between references and ints"
shortCorrection: "One cannot cast between references and ints"

- id: ReferenceToBooleanCoercion
  relation: To boolean instead of integer
inOtherPl:

- id: jls13
  sections: ["4.2.1", "5.1", "5.1.8"]

---
You can get the address of an object
by converting an object reference to an int,
and you can convert the address of an object,
given as an int,
to an object reference.
E.g., `Object o = (Object)12345678;`
or `int i = (int)new Object();`.

frontmatter.shortDescription: One can cast between references and ints
frontmatter.shortCorrection: One cannot cast between references and ints
